title: Saudia Apple Strudel
description: A classic German dessert with a twist of saudia spices, featuring a crispy, fluffy pastry and a sweet, spicy apple filling.
instructions: In a large bowl, combine flour, saudia spices, and salt. Mix well.
Add flaky butter and mix until the dough resembles coarse crumbs.
Gradually add yogurt and mix until the dough comes together in a ball.
Roll out the dough to a thickness of 1/8 inch (3 mm).
Peel, core, and slice the apple into wedges.
In a separate bowl, mix together cinnamon, nutmeg, and sugar.
Arrange the apple wedges on one half of the dough, leaving a 1/2 inch (1 cm) border.
Sprinkle the cinnamon mixture over the apple.
Fold the other half of the dough over the apple and press the edges to seal.
Bake for 25-30 minutes or until golden brown.
Serve warm with a scoop of vanilla ice cream.
